data.title: SciBase reports outcome of directed share issue authorized by 2024 AGM on June 16, 2025 in Stockholm.
data.description: In Stockholm on August 1, 2025, SciBase Holding AB (publ) shared news regarding a recent event. On June 16, 2025, the Company's Board of Directors made a decision in accordance with the authorization given during the annual general meeting from June 13, 2024. This decision pertained to a directed share issue conducted by SciBase.

data.title: In 2025, countries possess 463,000 BTC, with US and China at the forefront. Bhutan, Iran, and the UK also hold growing reserves.
data.description: As of 2025, governments worldwide collectively possess more than 463,000 bitcoins, indicating a significant increase in their hold on the digital asset. The United States and China are notably at the forefront in terms of bitcoin holdings, showcasing their interest and involvement in this emerging sector. Moreover, countries such as Bhutan, Iran, and the United Kingdom are observed to be discreetly establishing strategic reserves of bitcoins, signifying a growing trend towards diversifying and strengthening financial portfolios.

data.title: DayOne and Gaw Capital start construction on Tokyo data center campus; global developer and investor collaborate.
data.description: In Tokyo on August 1, 2025, global data center developer and operator DayOne, headquartered in Singapore, along with multi-asset investment management firm Gaw Capital Partners, began construction on a new project. DayOne, known for its expertise in data centers, partnered with Gaw Capital Partners, an investment firm specializing in real estate, growth equity, private credit, and infrastructure markets worldwide. The event marked the official start of the development, showcasing the collaboration between the two companies.
